entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE ADAPTATION RESPONSES
entities.description: Actions developed and delivered to adjust to the effects of climate change

entities.name: PUBLIC HEALTH
entities.description: The health of the population as a whole, specifically in the context of climate change adaptation

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC REVIEW
entities.description: A method of reviewing peer-reviewed literature to synthesize evidence on health effects

entities.name: LOW- AND MIDDLE-INCOME COUNTRIES
entities.description: Geographic regions with low to middle per capita income where adaptation responses were studied

entities.name: GLOBAL ADAPTATION MAPPING INITIATIVE
entities.description: A database of publications related to climate change adaptation responses used for literature screening

entities.name: FLOODING
entities.description: An environmental condition addressed by climate change adaptation responses

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: An environmental condition addressed by climate change adaptation responses

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: An environmental condition addressed by climate change adaptation responses

entities.name: EXTREME HEAT
entities.description: An environmental condition addressed by climate change adaptation responses

entities.name: BEHAVIOUR CHANGE
entities.description: A strategy used to implement climate change adaptation responses

entities.name: INFRASTRUCTURAL AND TECHNOLOGICAL IMPROVEMENTS
entities.description: A strategy used to implement climate change adaptation responses

entities.name: INFECTIOUS DISEASE INCIDENCE
entities.description: A health outcome that can be reduced by adaptation responses

entities.name: WATER AND SANITATION
entities.description: A health-related outcome involving access to clean water and hygiene

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: A health-related outcome involving reliable access to nutritious food

entities.name: ALL-CAUSE MORTALITY
entities.description: A health outcome rarely reported in the reviewed studies

entities.name: MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH
entities.description: A health area for which no reporting was identified in the review

entities.name: MALADAPTATIONS
entities.description: Adaptation responses that lead to negative outcomes or increase vulnerability

entities.name: INEQUALITIES
entities.description: Social disparities that may be widened by maladaptations

entities.name: CO-HARMS
entities.description: Unforeseen negative side effects resulting from maladaptations

entities.name: HUMAN HEALTH
entities.description: The overall physical and mental well-being of people affected by adaptation responses
